# PistonConfig

PistonConfig is a Java 25 configuration library with a format-neutral document model, comment-aware format backends, typed codecs, annotation configs, static field declarations, environment overrides, and migrations.

## Primary documentation

- Overview: https://config.pistonmaster.net/
- Getting started: https://config.pistonmaster.net/guides/getting-started.html
- Installation: https://config.pistonmaster.net/guides/installation.html
- Modules: https://config.pistonmaster.net/reference/modules.html
- Document model: https://config.pistonmaster.net/reference/document-model.html
- Format metadata: https://config.pistonmaster.net/reference/format-metadata.html
- Module builder: https://config.pistonmaster.net/tools/module-builder.html

## Source

- Repository: https://github.com/AlexProgrammerDE/PistonConfig
